## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `package.ps1` runs with no `[FAIL]` lines
- [ ] New/updated skill has a trigger `description:` with at least 5 WHEN phrases
- [ ] `manifest.json` updated if new skill added
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, PATs, or credentials in any committed file
